feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Stone Cold Lips
entry.summary:
Author: MetalHydrationVessel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,835Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 78

Summary: In which Merlin is immortal, used all of his free time to do things because he'd go crazy otherwise and got filthy rich like an old vampire without meaning to, hung out with Shakespeare and a bunch of other people because why not, got gifted a pretty Cadillac that he hates by a charity he'd forgotten he'd donated to, and has a too-high alcohol tolerance for his liking. Oh, and he bought Avalon Lake. Because "Shut up, I just like looking at this lake and no, I don't need help, mental or otherwise."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Just the Beginning (eng)
entry.summary:
Author: DraculaN666

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,528Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 19

Summary: Merlin has always known he has magic, but he also thought he was the only one. Like a very subtle genetic flaw that no one else was supposed to find out about. Until the Hogwarts letter arrived.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,045Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,300Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 29

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,549Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 58

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,329Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 18

Summary: After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,505Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: The Phantom of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Honestly_good_pancakes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,639Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 154

Summary: We all know how a small twist of fate can redesign the way a story is supposed to go. How one small act can reform reality into something almost unrecogniseable. So what would happen, if through one of these miniscule changes, Merlin never becomes Arthur's manservant? What if these two sides of the same coin, oblivious idiots, are never forced into close proximity to one another? What if, bound by fate, they live parallel lives within the walls of camelot Will destiny rewrite itself? Or force itself upon us? Or Arthur falls in love with the physician's apprentice without being made aware of that fact himself. Merlin is just trying to prove the stupid dragon wrong. Gwen was not prepared for any of this, and Morgana is happy to cause chaos. Leon technically did sign up for this, but in his defense, he didn't read the fine print. Gaius is desperately clinging on to the last remains of sanity in Camelot. Oh, and did I mention that there's a 'mysterious' sorcerer offering Uther unwanted advice? Because that happens too.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 412,642Chapters: 90/100Kudos: 526

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,310Chapters: 9/55Kudos: 59

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: It cannot be a lie if no one hears
entry.summary:
Author: Once_A_Monarch

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,354Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 86

Summary: Merlin doesn't reveal his magic when Arthur wakes up in DoTD pt2. Instead, Morgana reveals it in their last confrontation. (Aka Merlin goes slightly feral and unlocks the depths of his magic.)

  • Major Character Death
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin & Morgana (Merlin)
  • Morgana & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwen/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwen & Merlin (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Morgana (Merlin)
  • Gaius (Merlin)
  • Gwen (Merlin)
  • Merlin's Magic Revealed (Merlin)
  • Feral Merlin (Merlin)
  • Major Character Undeath
  • Heavy Angst
  • I'm Sorry
  • Title from a The Amazing Devil Song
  • Song: Elsa's Song (The Amazing Devil)
  • Canon Divergence - Episode: s05e13 The Diamond of the Day (Merlin)
  • Angst with a Happy Ending
  • Happy Ending
  • Magic
  • Post-Episode: s05e13 The Diamond of the Day (Merlin)
  • Five Years Later
  • POV Merlin (Merlin)
  • POV Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Post-Magic Reveal
  • Pre-Slash
  • Merthur do not have their shit together yet
  • But it's there
